mapper.select:
SELECT t.TEXTBOOK_SN, t.TEXTBOOK_NM, t.PUBR_NM, t.AUTHR_NM, t.TAGLINE, t.BOOK_SMRY, t.TOC_CN, t.COURSE_SN, t.ISBN_NO, t.TRGT_GRD_CN, t.SUBJ_ID, t.SALE_PRC_AMT, t.PURCH_PRC_AMT, t.DLVR_AMT, t.THMB_IMG, t.USE_YN, t.RGTR_ID, t.LAST_MDFR_ID, t.REG_DT, t.MDFCN_DT, s.SUBJ_NM AS SUBJ_NM, s.SUBJ_CL_ID AS SUBJ_CL_ID, sc.SUBJ_CL_NM AS SUBJ_CL_NM, m.USER_NAME AS INSTR_USER_NM, c.COURSE_NM AS COURSE_NM FROM TEXTBOOK t LEFT JOIN SUBJECT s ON t.SUBJ_ID = s.SUBJ_ID LEFT JOIN SUBJECT_CLASSIFICATION sc ON s.SUBJ_CL_ID = sc.SUBJ_CL_ID LEFT JOIN COURSE c ON t.COURSE_SN = c.COURSE_SN LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON c.INSTR_USER_ID = m.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TEXTBOOK_INVENTORY i ON t.TEXTBOOK_SN = i.TEXTBOOK_SN
ORDER BY
t.SALE_PRC_AMT DESC
NVL(i.SALABLE_CNT, 9999) ASC
t.REG_DT DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEXTBOOK t LEFT JOIN SUBJECT s ON t.SUBJ_ID = s.SUBJ_ID LEFT JOIN COURSE c ON t.COURSE_SN = c.COURSE_SN LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON c.INSTR_USER_ID = m.USER_ID

SELECT t.TEXTBOOK_SN, t.TEXTBOOK_NM, t.PUBR_NM, t.AUTHR_NM, t.TAGLINE, t.BOOK_SMRY, t.TOC_CN, t.COURSE_SN, t.ISBN_NO, t.TRGT_GRD_CN, t.SUBJ_ID, t.SALE_PRC_AMT, t.PURCH_PRC_AMT, t.DLVR_AMT, t.THMB_IMG, t.USE_YN, t.RGTR_ID, t.LAST_MDFR_ID, t.REG_DT, t.MDFCN_DT, s.SUBJ_NM AS SUBJ_NM, s.SUBJ_CL_ID AS SUBJ_CL_ID, sc.SUBJ_CL_NM AS SUBJ_CL_NM, m.USER_NAME AS INSTR_USER_NM, c.COURSE_NM AS COURSE_NM FROM TEXTBOOK t LEFT JOIN SUBJECT s ON t.SUBJ_ID = s.SUBJ_ID LEFT JOIN SUBJECT_CLASSIFICATION sc ON s.SUBJ_CL_ID = sc.SUBJ_CL_ID LEFT JOIN COURSE c ON t.COURSE_SN = c.COURSE_SN LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON c.INSTR_USER_ID = m.USER_ID WHERE t.TEXTBOOK_SN = #{textbookSn} AND t.USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT "TEAM1_202512AF"."ISEQ$$_433531".CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TEXTBOOK ( TEXTBOOK_NM, PUBR_NM, AUTHR_NM, ISBN_NO, TRGT_GRD_CN, SUBJ_ID, COURSE_SN, TAGLINE, BOOK_SMRY, TOC_CN, SALE_PRC_AMT, PURCH_PRC_AMT, DLVR_AMT, THMB_IMG, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT ) VALUES ( #{textbookNm}, #{pubrNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authrNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isbnNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trgtGrdCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subjId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{courseSn, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{tagline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bookSmry, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tocCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salePrcAmt}, #{purchPrcAmt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dlvrAmt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{thmbImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{useYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), #{rgtrId}, #{lastMdfrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEXTBOOK WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND TRUNC(REG_DT, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEXTBOOK t JOIN TEXTBOOK_INVENTORY i ON t.TEXTBOOK_SN = i.TEXTBOOK_SN WHERE t.USE_YN = 'Y' AND i.SALABLE_CNT <= i.MIN_KEEP_CNT AND i.SALABLE_CNT > 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEXTBOOK t JOIN TEXTBOOK_INVENTORY i ON t.TEXTBOOK_SN = i.TEXTBOOK_SN WHERE t.USE_YN = 'Y' AND i.SALABLE_CNT = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEXTBOOK WHERE USE_YN = 'N'
